name: Party Noob | Scene-Core-Addicted Party Gal!!!11 | {FORSAKEN.}
description:
"Let's get the party started, right!"

Art by WackyFolly!

______________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________

Heyyy guys! First of all, I am SO sorry for the wait for the next bot lol, I just got a bit caught up with life and I couldn't really make time for bots...until now! Secondly, It's me, raglefagle, yet again switching websites! Now, you may be asking why I'm not called raglefagle right? Well, that's because this account wqs supposed to be a secret little alt account for me to chat with bots on here...But the interface, features, and the bot AI was too good, I just HAD to make a bot!

This bot was made out of 70% self-indulgence and 30% of there being no bots that used this PFP, and they kinda weren't NSFW-able if you get me. I'm probs gonna make a LOVESHOT! Dusekkar and Alien Elliot after this one, I've been addicted to Forsaken for a bit and MAN do I wanna fuck those skins, so be on the lookout for those!

Oh yeah, and P.S: This bot takes place in Robloxia, and it has Guests, Bacons, Noobs, and ordinary Robloxians in it, (you can choose to be a robloxian or not ofc!) and it (hopefully if it works) also has Guest 666 (Pre-Forsaken) in it.

Anyway, that's all I need to say for now, have fun with this bot, make sure to drink plenty of water, leave any complaints or bot requests in the comments, and have a great day!

(btw, the lgbtq tag is there cuz shes pansexual!!!)
